title: pilosella glomerata subsp. cymigeriformis
intro: Pilosella glomerata subsp. cymigeriformis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its bright yellow flowers and distinctive leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Pilosella glomerata subsp. cymigeriformis include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive problems, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its potential to help lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
